## Conventional Commits

This PR's title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
Commitizen uses commit messages to auto-bump versions on merge to `main`:

- `feat:` → minor bump
- `fix:` → patch bump
- `BREAKING CHANGE:` in body → major bump
- `chore:`, `ci:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`, `test:` → no bump
